text_block_list.text: Biwa Hayahide's big day has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This debut race is full of promising prospects who
just signed on with new trainers.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
At long last, I get to see the results of my
training. It's time to focus and do this!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I promise I won't let you down. Let's take
home a win.
